title: Fix agent_type unknown bug in hooks

log.context: Fix agent_type unknown bug in hooks

Done. Here's a summary of all changes made:

**`/mnt/data/scripts/hooks/subagent-start.sh` (two locations):**
- Line 32: Changed the default variable initialization `SUBAGENT_TYPE="unknown"` to `"general-purpose"`.
- Line 45: Changed the fallback in the jq expression `.subagent_type // "unknown"` to `// "general-purpose"`.
